title: sida ridleyi
intro: Sida ridleyi, also known as the Wild Cotton or Cotton Bush, is a species of flowering plant in the Malvaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. Sida ridleyi is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
